name: Build Flatpak
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      version:
        description: 'Version to build (e.g., 1.0.0 - without the v prefix)'
        required: true
        type: string

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Install flatpak and dependencies
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y flatpak flatpak-builder
      
      - name: Add flathub remote
        run: |
          flatpak remote-add --if-not-exists --user flathub https://flathub.org/repo/flathub.flatpakrepo
      
      - name: Install runtimes and SDK
        run: |
          flatpak install -y --user flathub org.freedesktop.Platform//23.08
          flatpak install -y --user flathub org.freedesktop.Sdk//23.08
          flatpak install -y --user flathub org.electronjs.Electron2.BaseApp//23.08
      
      - name: Download and extract AppImage
        run: |
          mkdir -p build-input
          cd build-input
          
          echo "Downloading AppImage for version ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}..."
          
          # Correct AppImage name format: Gaia.Mod-x.x.x.AppImage
          APPIMAGE_NAME="Gaia.Mod-${{ github.event.inputs.version }}.AppImage"
          DOWNLOAD_URL="https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/v${{ github.event.inputs.version }}/${APPIMAGE_NAME}"
          
          echo "Attempting to download from: ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
          
          if ! wget "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" -O gaiamod.AppImage; then
            echo "Failed to download AppImage. Checking available assets..."
            gh release view "v${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" --json assets -q '.assets[].name'
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "AppImage downloaded successfully!"
          ls -lh gaiamod.AppImage
          
          echo "Extracting AppImage..."
          chmod +x gaiamod.AppImage
          ./gaiamod.AppImage --appimage-extract
          
          echo "Moving contents..."
          mv squashfs-root/* .
          rm -rf squashfs-root gaiamod.AppImage
          
          echo "Verifying gaiamod executable exists..."
          if [ ! -f "gaiamod" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: gaiamod executable not found!"
            echo "Contents of build-input:"
            ls -la
            exit 1
          fi
          
          chmod +x gaiamod
          echo "Build input prepared successfully!"
          ls -la
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      
      - name: Verify Flatpak manifest exists
        run: |
          if [ ! -f ".flatpak/com.gaiamod.desktop.json" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: .flatpak/com.gaiamod.desktop.json not found!"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          if [ ! -f ".flatpak/com.gaiamod.desktop.desktop" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: .flatpak/com.gaiamod.desktop.desktop not found!"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "Flatpak manifest files found!"
      
      - name: Build Flatpak
        run: |
          echo "Building Flatpak..."
          flatpak-builder --user --force-clean --repo=repo build-dir .flatpak/com.gaiamod.desktop.json
          
          if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Flatpak build failed!"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "Flatpak built successfully!"
      
      - name: Create bundle
        run: |
          echo "Creating Flatpak bundle..."
          flatpak build-bundle repo com.gaiamod.desktop.flatpak com.gaiamod.desktop
          
          if [ ! -f "com.gaiamod.desktop.flatpak" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Bundle creation failed!"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          echo "Bundle created successfully!"
          ls -lh com.gaiamod.desktop.flatpak
      
      - name: Test Flatpak installation
        run: |
          echo "Testing Flatpak installation..."
          flatpak install -y --user com.gaiamod.desktop.flatpak
          
          echo "Verifying installation..."
          flatpak list --user | grep gaiamod
          
          echo "Checking installed files..."
          flatpak run --command=sh com.gaiamod.desktop -c "ls -la /app/gaiamod/ | head -20"
          
          echo "Verifying gaiamod executable..."
          flatpak run --command=sh com.gaiamod.desktop -c "test -x /app/gaiamod/gaiamod && echo 'Executable found and is executable' || echo 'ERROR: Executable not found or not executable'"
          
          echo "Flatpak test completed successfully!"
      
      - name: Upload to Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
        with:
          files: com.gaiamod.desktop.flatpak
          tag_name: v${{ github.event.inputs.version }}
          fail_on_unmatched_files: true
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      
      - name: Upload bundle as artifact (backup)
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: flatpak-bundle
          path: com.gaiamod.desktop.flatpak
          retention-days: 30
